ui_fixes_live_at_capture_time: Shared <!--ZK_HEADER--> partial used (was custom header) — keeps rag page in sync with /home/zettels
Composer textarea overflow:hidden — phantom scrollbar buttons gone
Advanced Filters disclosure removed (DOM kept hidden so JS contract unchanged); default quality forced to 'high' or 'fast' via JS
Role label personalized: 'USER' replaced with the signed-in user's display name ("Naruto" in this run)
Message bubbles tighter (reduced padding, smaller role/meta type)
Model-name + token-count metadata hidden from end users (no infra disclosure)
SSE pre-yield 'queued' status flush in <100 ms (Caddy/Cloudflare don't time out the response head)
Server-side single retry on cold-start orchestrator failures (~0.8 s backoff)
Client-side single retry on 502/503/504 + fetch reject
Friendly mid-stream error: 'Lost connection mid-answer. Please retry.' (was raw 'network error')
Friendly orchestrator error: 'I hit a temporary error while answering. Please retry in a moment.'
Gemini SDK timeout 60s -> 180s (was a hard cap on Pro multi-hop synthesis)
_meta.capture_method: Direct POST /api/rag/adhoc {stream:false} from inside the authenticated chat tab, plus q1 captured via the streaming UI form path (both flow through the same orchestrator). The non-stream path was used for q2–q10 because the streaming SSE path was hitting Cloudflare 502s on long bodies during this capture window.
_meta.quality_mode: fast (gemini-2.5-flash). High-quality (gemini-2.5-pro) was tried first and consistently blew the 60 s SDK timeout on the multi-hop and thematic queries — the 180 s bump shipped just before this capture but Cloudflare/Caddy upstream was already returning 502 for the long-body adhoc POSTs by then.
_meta.known_constraints: Five queries (q4, q5, q6, q7, q10) returned 502 Bad Gateway from Cloudflare during the direct-POST capture pass. The 502s arrived in 119–5831 ms — much faster than any orchestrator path could fail, indicating Cloudflare or Caddy is dropping the connection before the upstream container responds. Likely root cause is the 1 GB droplet's single-uvicorn-worker getting oversubscribed when 5 concurrent quality:fast retrieval+rerank+LLM pipelines kick off in the same window. Out of scope for this iter — see next_actions.md.

results.text: Which programming language is the zk-org/zk command-line tool written in, and what file format does it use for notes?
results.answer: The `zk-org/zk` command-line tool is written in Go [id="gh-zk-org-zk"]. It processes and supports Markdown for its notes [id="gh-zk-org-zk"].

citations.title: The Pragmatic Engineer: The Product-Minded Engineer

results.text: What metaphor did Steve Jobs use at the Stanford 2005 commencement to describe the role of death in motivating life choices?
results.answer: Steve Jobs described death as "the single best invention of Life" and "Life's change agent" for clearing out the old [id="yt-steve-jobs-2005-stanford"]. He claimed that remembering one will die is the most effective way to avoid the "trap of thinking you have something to lose," asserting that "You are already naked. There is no reason not to follow your heart" [id="yt-steve-jobs-2005-stanford"].
